scripts.pack: npm run build && mkdir -p dist && cp -r out dist/ai-article-layout/ && cp scripts/start.command dist/ai-article-layout/ && cp scripts/start.bat dist/ai-article-layout/ && chmod +x dist/ai-article-layout/start.command && cd dist && zip -r ai-article-layout.zip ai-article-layout/ && cd .. && echo '✅ Package ready: dist/ai-article-layout.zip'
